summary: Record the bounded aggregate regression and root-cause repair after wiring document-scoped AI conversation hydration: all 169 test files and 1261 tests pass.

decisions.decision: Treat the missing useMemo import exposed by the first aggregate run as one root-cause compile/runtime defect, repair it once, confirm focused Workbench/App coverage, then run one aggregate suite.
decisions.rationale: The failure was deterministic and cascading; no repeated test loop was warranted after the root cause was isolated.

testEvidence.criterion: The full suite remains green after AI persistence hydration and the root-cause repair.
testEvidence.test: Run focused Workbench/App tests once after the repair, then one bounded aggregate suite.

red.outcome: RED: 8 UI/App files failed with the same ReferenceError because Workbench used useMemo without importing it; 52 tests failed as cascades.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/Workbench.test.tsx tests/ui/Workbench.native-menu.test.tsx tests/app/App.test.tsx; pnpm.cmd test -- --reporter=dot
green.outcome: GREEN: focused Workbench/App checks passed 3 files and 43 tests; aggregate passed 169 files and 1261 tests in 19.37s.

questions: Provider-secret hydration for redaction, project-export conversation policy, and hosted AC-10.d evidence remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
